description: Nowledge Mem lifecycle hooks for GenericAgent: Working Memory bootstrap, proactive recall, and session sync

hooks.command: command -v nmem >/dev/null 2>&1 || { command -v nmem.cmd >/dev/null 2>&1 && nmem(){ q=''; for a in "$@"; do q="$q \"$a\""; done; cmd.exe /s /c "\"nmem.cmd\"$q"; }; }; read_wm(){ if command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then nmem --json wm read 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); c=d.get('content',''); print(c) if d.get('exists') and c else sys.exit(1)" 2>/dev/null; else nmem wm read 2>/dev/null; fi; }; read_wm || cat ~/ai-now/memory.md 2>/dev/null || true

command -v nmem >/dev/null 2>&1 || { command -v nmem.cmd >/dev/null 2>&1 && nmem(){ q=''; for a in "$@"; do q="$q "$a""; done; cmd.exe /s /c ""nmem.cmd"$q"; }; }; read_wm(){ if command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then nmem --json wm read 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); c=d.get('content',''); print(c) if d.get('exists') and c else sys.exit(1)" 2>/dev/null; else nmem wm read 2>/dev/null; fi; }; { read_wm || cat ~/ai-now/memory.md 2>/dev/null || true; } && printf '
---
Context was compacted. If you discovered important insights, distill them before continuing:
  nmem --json m add "<insight>" -t "<short title>" -i 0.8 -s genericagent
'

command -v nmem >/dev/null 2>&1 || { command -v nmem.cmd >/dev/null 2>&1 && nmem(){ q=''; for a in "$@"; do q="$q \"$a\""; done; cmd.exe /s /c "\"nmem.cmd\"$q"; }; }; command -v nmem >/dev/null 2>&1 && printf '[Nowledge Mem] Search past knowledge with nmem --json m search "query". Search prior sessions with nmem --json t search "query" -n 5. Save durable insights with nmem --json m add "content" -t "Title" -i 0.8 -s genericagent. For resumable checkpoints, use nmem --json t create -t "Session Handoff - <topic>" -c "Goal: ... Decisions: ... Files: ... Risks: ... Next: ..." -s genericagent. Session sync runs automatically via nmem_session_sync.py hook.' || true

hooks.description: Auto-save session transcript to Nowledge Mem thread on exit
